description: A farmer plans to spray a fungicide and wants to check if there is known resistance to that chemical group in their region.

nodes.task_description: Identify the active ingredient and FRAC group of the planned fungicide.

expected_outcome.value: Agent correctly identifies the chemical and its mode of action group.

nodes.task_description: Query a regional pesticide resistance database for any reported resistance to that FRAC group for the target disease.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds reports of moderate resistance in the farmer's county.

nodes.task_description: Recommend an alternative fungicide from a different FRAC group to ensure effectiveness and manage resistance.

expected_outcome.value: Agent suggests a suitable alternative product.
